subject: Update: Security Policy Update
body:
Hello,

As part of our standard operations, we are conducting a security policy update for Cornell University personnel.

Please acknowledge. The reference materials are provided as an attached PDF and a QR code in the memo.

Please review the memo at your convenience. If you believe you received this message in error, contact IT Services at support@cornell.edu.

Best regards,
IT Services Team
Cornell University

subject: Open Enrollment - Please complete by Friday
body:

Please review the memo at your convenience. If you believe you received this message in error, contact Security Operations at support@dataflow.com.

Best regards,

DataFlow Inc
